message:
feat(render): flicker/tear detection integration tests and buffer dirty tracking fixes

Add 25 comprehensive flicker integration tests connecting the full render
pipeline (Buffer → Diff → Presenter) to FlickerDetector. Tests cover
sync brackets, property-based diff completeness, no-ghosting on resize,
golden checksums, JSONL logging schema, and multi-frame scenarios.

Fix 8 pre-existing buffer dirty tracking test failures caused by
Buffer::new() initializing all rows dirty — tests now call clear_dirty()
to establish clean baselines before testing mutation-based dirtying.

Closes bd-1rz0.18. Unblocks bd-1rz0.20.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
